task_completion.description: Open the DreamPlan software and load the Contemporary House sample project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the NCH DreamPlan application window open, displaying a 3D or 2D floor plan of a house model (Contemporary House).

task_completion.description: Place a sofa (or sectional/loveseat) and a coffee table in the Living Room.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the DreamPlan workspace should show the living room area with at least one sofa/sectional/loveseat and a coffee table added to the space.

task_completion.description: Place a dining table and at least two chairs in the Dining Room.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the DreamPlan workspace should show the dining room area with a dining table and a minimum of two chairs placed around it.

task_completion.description: Place a bed and at least one additional item (nightstand, dresser, wardrobe, or lamp) in the Bedroom.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the DreamPlan workspace should show a bedroom area containing a bed and at least one of the specified additional furniture items.

task_completion.description: Export an image of the furnished living room to the Desktop as staged_living_room.jpg.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a 'Save As' or export dialog saving 'staged_living_room.jpg' to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop, or the file icon visible on the Desktop.

task_completion.description: Export an image of the furnished dining room to the Desktop as staged_dining_room.jpg.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a 'Save As' or export dialog saving 'staged_dining_room.jpg' to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop, or the file icon visible on the Desktop.

task_completion.description: Export an image of the furnished bedroom to the Desktop as staged_bedroom.jpg.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a 'Save As' or export dialog saving 'staged_bedroom.jpg' to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop, or the file icon visible on the Desktop.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the NCH DreamPlan GUI to place furniture and export images.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through the DreamPlan interface, using the furniture catalog, and using the software's built-in export/save features, rather than using terminal commands to generate fake files.

integrity.description: The exported images are genuine 3D renderings from the DreamPlan software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The views being exported should match the graphical style of the DreamPlan 3D engine, not stock photos downloaded from a web browser.

integrity.description: The agent actively placed new furniture items into the rooms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the process of selecting items from the catalog and placing them in the rooms, rather than just taking screenshots of pre-existing furnished rooms.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires using NCH DreamPlan software and its built-in 'Contemporary House' sample project. The agent must export three JPEG images to the Desktop: staged_living_room.jpg, staged_dining_room.jpg, and staged_bedroom.jpg. Each exported image must be larger than 30KB, indicating it contains actual rendered content from the software.
